content: Self-Refine’s task-specific, iterative output refinement and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-backed self-reflection can be combined to create a hybrid autonomous AI agent that accumulates long-term improvement across similar tasks, rather than just refining individual outputs in isolation. This hybrid framework would let an agent build on generalized self-reflection memories to speed up refinement for new, related requests, eliminating the need to restart the refinement process from scratch for every task.
